# Romosozumab 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Romosozumab 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Romosozumab</strong> 目前有 <strong>6 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Romosozumab 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Evenity is indicated in treatment of severe osteoporosis in postmenopausal women at high risk of fracture.</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>phosphorus metabolism disease（99.5%）</li>
<li>hypercalcemia disease（98.3%）</li>
<li>obsolete vitamin D deficiency（97.8%）</li>
<li>nephrocalcinosis（97.5%）</li>
<li>calcium-alkali syndrome（97.4%）</li>
<li>primary bone dysplasia with defective bone mineralization（97.3%）</li>
<li>postmenopausal osteoporosis（95.9%）</li>
<li>severe nonproliferative diabetic retinopathy（95.0%）</li>
<li>osteoporosis（94.9%）</li>
<li>renal osteodystrophy（94.3%）</li>
<li>osteomalacia (disease)（93.5%）</li>
<li>pregnancy associated osteoporosis（92.9%）</li>
<li>autosomal dominant neovascular inflammatory vitreoretinopathy（92.4%）</li>
<li>Worth syndrome（92.4%）</li>
<li>impaired renal function disease（91.5%）</li>
<li>succinyl-CoA:3-ketoacid CoA transferase deficiency（91.1%）</li>
<li>hypophosphatemic rickets（89.6%）</li>
<li>non-renal secondary hyperparathyroidism（89.5%）</li>
<li>bone remodeling disease（88.9%）</li>
<li>hereditary hypophosphatemic rickets（88.5%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/romosozumab/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
